current_life_events: The landlord just notified me that the rent has gone up, and I’m already struggling to keep up with the higher monthly payment. My car broke down last week, forcing me to rely on public transport for my part‑time gigs, which has cut into my earnings. I’ve been working extra shifts to make ends meet, but the added commute costs and maintenance bills are piling up.
mental_state: I feel a mix of frustration and determination, but the constant pressure is draining my energy.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The sudden rent hike and car repair expenses have created an immediate financial crunch, prompting me to seek support today.
